message:
fix: add file locking to EnsureMetadata to prevent read-modify-write race

Concurrent goroutines calling EnsureMetadata (via EnsureAllMetadata)
could corrupt metadata.json when targeting the same file. Added flock-
based file locking around the read-modify-write cycle using the already-
imported gofrs/flock package. New test exercises 10 concurrent writers
on the same metadata.json with race detector enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
